articles.title: OPENAI'S SORA APP IS STRUGGLING AFTER ITS STELLAR LAUNCH
articles.summary: OpenAI's Sora video-generation app experienced a dramatic decline after its stellar October launch, with downloads dropping 32% in December and 45% in January despite initially reaching 1 million downloads faster than ChatGPT. Consumer spending also fell 32% month over month in January, with the app dropping from the top spot in the US App Store to No. 101 overall. The decline is attributed to increased competition from Google's Gemini and Meta AI, as well as ongoing copyright infringement issues.

articles.title: ADOBE ANIMATE IS SHUTTING DOWN AS COMPANY FOCUSES ON AI
articles.summary: Adobe is shutting down its long-running 2D animation tool Adobe Animate as it continues to reorient its product lineup around AI, with the software set to be discontinued on March 1. While enterprise customers will receive extended support through 2029, many users are frustrated by the lack of a true replacement and Adobe's suggestion to piece together Animate features using other Creative Cloud apps. The move follows months of signals that Animate was being deprioritized, including its absence from Adobe Max and the lack of a 2025 release.

articles.title: ALL-NEW MACBOOK PRO DESIGN REPORTEDLY SET TO LAUNCH IN FINAL QUARTER THIS YEAR
articles.summary: Apple is expected to launch updated MacBook Pro models with M5 Pro and M5 Max chips soon, keeping the current design but delivering major performance gains, likely alongside macOS 26.3. A larger update, expected in Q4, will introduce a slimmer redesigned MacBook Pro with Samsung-made OLED displays in 14- and 16-inch sizes, possibly a punch-hole camera, and even touch support, though some Apple-specific components are still being finalized.

articles.title: UI DESIGN WITH NANO BANANA PRO: PRACTICAL USE CASES, WORKFLOW, AND SAMPLE PROMPTS
articles.summary: Nano Banana Pro is a visual thinking engine for UI designers that offers strong spatial understanding, accurate text rendering, and 4K output to accelerate early-stage design exploration. The tool enables rapid ideation by generating style explorations, layout variations, wireframe translations, and complex dashboard interfaces through prompt-based methods. While it doesn't replace production design tools or address accessibility and technical constraints, Nano Banana Pro shortens feedback loops by producing high-fidelity mockups that effectively communicate structure and aesthetic direction.

articles.title: HOW TO BUILD A CREATIVE BRAND STRATEGY THAT ACTUALLY CONVERTS
articles.summary: A creative brand strategy is a structured plan that uses storytelling and creative ideas to define how a brand expresses its identity and differentiates itself from competitors. It strengthens market position by providing clarity that makes your brand the obvious choice rather than just another option, while attracting the right customers who are already halfway sold because your brand resonates with them. The strategy builds emotional connections by understanding how customers actually think, leading to stronger preference and loyalty over time.

articles.title: DON'T ASK QUESTIONS YOU CAN FIND ANSWERS TO ONLINE
articles.summary: Beyond skills, hiring decisions often hinge on fresh perspectives, values alignment, genuine engagement with the company, and thoughtful preparation—factors that can help less-experienced candidates stand out against more senior competition.

articles.title: AI PRESENTATION CREATOR
articles.summary: Kimi Slides is an AI-powered presentation creator that transforms ideas into stunning slides within minutes.

articles.title: AUDIO TO VIDEO AI
articles.summary: LTX Studio offers an AI-powered audio-to-video converter that transforms uploaded audio files, recorded voice, or generated sounds into video content.

articles.title: AI ASSISTANT FOR SOLIDWORKS
articles.summary: Describe your design in plain language, and LAD will translate it into SolidWorks operations, creating sketches, features, and assemblies all through natural conversation.

articles.title: AGENT ORCHESTRATION UI
articles.summary: AI products have evolved from behind-the-scenes models to chat interfaces to agents, and now to agent orchestration, where multiple agents coordinate on unified tasks. Intent by Augment introduces a new UI approach for agent orchestration that focuses on workspaces, context management, and specialized agents working in parallel. The platform uses isolated spaces with living specifications that allow coordinator, implementer, and verifier agents to work together while maintaining alignment through shared context.

articles.title: HOW TO MANAGE BREAKING CHANGES IN DESIGN TOKENS
articles.summary: Design systems require a three-phase approach to manage breaking changes in design tokens: deprecation, migration, and removal. During deprecation, mark tokens with flags and provide clear timelines; during migration, offer both old and new tokens with guides and tools; and during removal, clean up deprecated tokens in a major version release. Success depends on clear communication, adequate migration periods, and proper documentation throughout the process.

articles.title: SIX POWERFUL WAYS TO MAKE YOUR NEXT REBRAND BETTER
articles.summary: Branding has moved beyond static assets into flexible, evolving systems that integrate type, colour, sound, motion, and cultural awareness from the start. Design brands as living frameworks — emotionally expressive, accessible, adaptable, and culturally engaged — rather than fixed visual checklists meant only for launch day.

articles.title: TIPS ON HOW TO PICK THE RIGHT ICONS FOR YOUR WEBSITE
articles.summary: Icons should be meaningful, culturally relevant, and labeled when their meaning isn't universally clear.

articles.title: HOW TO MEASURE THE IMPACT OF FEATURES
articles.summary: The TARS framework helps measure feature impact by tracking the funnel from Target audience (% of users with the problem) to Adoption (% who engage with the feature) to Retention (continued usage) and Satisfaction scores.

articles.title: LI WANG CAPTURES LIFE, LOVE AND LONGING IN COLOUR
articles.summary: Artist Li Wang explains how moving from Beijing to New York reshaped his painting into a deeply personal exploration of queer identity, masculinity, and memory, with his work now serving as an emotional documentation of lived experience.
